message:
test: add Clone_RootOnly_CreatedCountMatchesActual test (GH#2411)

Fix-merge of PR #2411 by nmelo. The core fix (using len(idMapping)
instead of len(subgraph.Issues) in cloneSubgraph was already on main
via c12cceaf. This adds the regression test from the PR.

Closes #2410, closes #2411.
